description_long: This bulletin board features a tall, rectangular display panel supported by four slender wooden legs, giving it a freestanding and stable structure. The front panel is white and contains printed information, images, and text, suggesting it is used for public announcements or educational displays. The frame is minimalistic, with the legs extending above the top edge of the board, possibly for added stability or ease of transport. The side views reveal the board is relatively thin, with the display surface slightly angled for better visibility. The back of the board is plain, lacking any additional features or attachments. The overall design is functional and suitable for placement in public or semi-public urban environments such as parks, sidewalks, or community centers.
description: A tall, freestanding bulletin board with a white display panel and four slender wooden legs, featuring printed information and images on the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white display panel with printed information and images, supported by four wooden legs.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the board and the angled stance of the supporting legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain back of the board and the full height of the wooden legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and angled legs, with no visible display content.
attribute_frame_design: Rectangular frame with four slender, straight wooden legs extending above the top edge; no visible decorative elements.
